name: Employee Salary Information
query:
Select
company as "Company:Link/Company:140",
name as "Emp Code:Link/Employee:120",
date_of_birth as "DOB:Date:100",
employee_name as "Name:Data:140",
date_of_joining as "DOJ:Date:100",
nett_salary as "Nett Salary:Currency:120",
gross_salary as "Gross Salary:Currency:120",
ctc as "CTC:Currency:120"

from `tabEmployee`
where status = 'Active'
Order by company
